gpt-4o.name: GPT-4o
gpt-4o.description: OpenAI's flagship omnimodal model capable of reasoning across text, audio, image, and video in real time. Sets new benchmarks for intelligence and conversational fluency with near-instant response times.

gpt-4o-mini.name: GPT-4o Mini
gpt-4o-mini.description: Cost-efficient small model from OpenAI with multimodal capabilities. Ideal for high-volume applications requiring fast, quality responses across text and vision tasks.

gpt-4-turbo.name: GPT-4 Turbo
gpt-4-turbo.description: OpenAI's most advanced model optimized for speed and cost-effectiveness while maintaining high reasoning capabilities. Excels at complex tasks, creative writing, and nuanced understanding across all domains.

gpt-4.name: GPT-4
gpt-4.description: OpenAI's powerful large language model with broad general knowledge and advanced reasoning abilities. Perfect for complex problem-solving, content creation, and detailed analysis.

gpt-3.5-turbo.name: GPT-3.5 Turbo
gpt-3.5-turbo.description: Fast and efficient model from OpenAI, ideal for conversational applications, content generation, and tasks requiring quick responses with high quality.

o1-preview.name: o1-preview
o1-preview.description: OpenAI's reasoning-focused model designed for complex scientific, mathematical, and coding problems. Uses internal chain-of-thought reasoning before responding for enhanced accuracy.

o1-mini.name: o1-mini
o1-mini.description: Fast and efficient reasoning model from OpenAI, optimized for coding and STEM tasks. Delivers strong performance on complex problems at lower cost.

claude-3-opus.name: Claude 3 Opus
claude-3-opus.description: Anthropic's most intelligent model, setting new industry benchmarks across reasoning, math, and coding. Demonstrates near-human levels of comprehension and fluency on complex tasks.

claude-3-sonnet.name: Claude 3 Sonnet
claude-3-sonnet.description: Balanced model from Anthropic offering strong reasoning capabilities with improved speed and efficiency. Ideal for enterprise workloads requiring both intelligence and rapid response.

claude-3-haiku.name: Claude 3 Haiku
claude-3-haiku.description: Fastest and most compact model in the Claude 3 family, designed for near-instant responsiveness and high-throughput applications requiring quality intelligence.

claude-3.5-sonnet.name: Claude 3.5 Sonnet
claude-3.5-sonnet.description: Anthropic's latest balanced model with enhanced intelligence, improved coding capabilities, and deeper reasoning. Outperforms larger models on graduate-level reasoning and coding benchmarks.

gemini-1.5-pro.name: Gemini 1.5 Pro
gemini-1.5-pro.description: Google's most capable multimodal model with a breakthrough million-token context window. Processes and understands vast amounts of information across text, images, audio, and video seamlessly.

gemini-1.5-flash.name: Gemini 1.5 Flash
gemini-1.5-flash.description: Fast and efficient multimodal model from Google, optimized for high-frequency tasks at scale. Delivers quality results with minimal latency across text, image, and video inputs.

gemini-1.0-pro.name: Gemini 1.0 Pro
gemini-1.0-pro.description: Google's powerful language model with strong reasoning, coding, and creative capabilities. Designed for complex tasks requiring deep understanding and quality generation.

gemma-2-27b.name: Gemma 2 27B
gemma-2-27b.description: Google's open-source instruction-tuned model with state-of-the-art performance for its size. Excels at reasoning, coding, and following complex instructions efficiently.

gemma-2-9b.name: Gemma 2 9B
gemma-2-9b.description: Compact open-source model from Google with impressive capabilities for its size. Perfect for deployment in resource-constrained environments while maintaining strong performance.

llama-3.1-405b.name: Llama 3.1 405B
llama-3.1-405b.description: Meta's largest and most capable open-source model, rivaling leading closed-source models. Features enhanced multilingual support, improved reasoning, and state-of-the-art tool use.

llama-3.1-70b.name: Llama 3.1 70B
llama-3.1-70b.description: Meta's powerful open-source model with enhanced reasoning, coding, and multilingual capabilities. Ideal for enterprise applications requiring high performance with open accessibility.

llama-3.1-8b.name: Llama 3.1 8B
llama-3.1-8b.description: Efficient open-source model from Meta, updated with enhanced capabilities. Delivers strong performance for its size, making it ideal for edge deployment and high-throughput applications.

llama-3-70b.name: Llama 3 70B
llama-3-70b.description: Meta's powerful open-source model featuring enhanced reasoning, coding, and instruction-following capabilities. Outperforms many closed-source models on industry benchmarks.

llama-3-8b.name: Llama 3 8B
llama-3-8b.description: Compact yet powerful open-source model from Meta, ideal for deployment in resource-constrained environments while maintaining strong performance on diverse tasks.

mistral-large.name: Mistral Large
mistral-large.description: Mistral AI's flagship model with state-of-the-art reasoning, multilingual capabilities, and native function calling. Excels at complex enterprise-grade tasks.

mistral-small.name: Mistral Small
mistral-small.description: Efficient model from Mistral optimized for low-latency applications. Delivers strong performance on a wide range of tasks with fast response times.

mixtral-8x22b.name: Mixtral 8x22B
mixtral-8x22b.description: Large mixture-of-experts model from Mistral with enhanced capabilities and broader knowledge. Leverages 22B active parameters from 141B total for efficient high-quality inference.

mixtral-8x7b.name: Mixtral 8x7B
mixtral-8x7b.description: Groundbreaking sparse mixture-of-experts model from Mistral, delivering high performance with efficient inference. Matches or exceeds larger models on many benchmarks.

codestral.name: Codestral
codestral.description: Mistral's specialized code generation model trained on over 80 programming languages. Excels at code completion, generation, testing, and filling-in-the-middle tasks with exceptional accuracy.

command-r-plus.name: Command R+
command-r-plus.description: Cohere's most advanced RAG-optimized model with strong multilingual support and enterprise-grade retrieval capabilities. Perfect for knowledge-intensive applications and conversational AI.

command-r.name: Command R
command-r.description: Cohere's scalable RAG-optimized model designed for production workloads. Balances strong performance with efficiency for retrieval-augmented generation and enterprise applications.

deepseek-v2.name: DeepSeek-V2
deepseek-v2.description: Powerful Mixture-of-Experts model from DeepSeek with exceptional reasoning and coding abilities. Trained on high-quality multilingual data for superior performance.

deepseek-v2.5.name: DeepSeek-V2.5
deepseek-v2.5.description: Updated version of DeepSeek's flagship model with enhanced general capabilities, stronger coding performance, and improved alignment. Combines the best of DeepSeek-Coder and DeepSeek-V2.

deepseek-coder-v2.name: DeepSeek-Coder-V2
deepseek-coder-v2.description: Specialized code generation model from DeepSeek, excelling at programming tasks, debugging, and software development across multiple languages. Outperforms many general-purpose models on coding benchmarks.

deepseek-v3.name: DeepSeek-V3
deepseek-v3.description: DeepSeek's latest and most powerful MoE model with 671B total parameters and 37B active. Achieves state-of-the-art performance among open-source models with efficient inference and strong multilingual capabilities.

qwen2.5-72b.name: Qwen2.5 72B
qwen2.5-72b.description: Alibaba's advanced multilingual model with strong performance across reasoning, coding, and mathematics. Supports extensive context length and multiple languages with deep instruction following.

qwen2.5-32b.name: Qwen2.5 32B
qwen2.5-32b.description: Balanced model from Alibaba offering strong performance with efficient resource usage. Excels at multilingual tasks, reasoning, and instruction following across diverse applications.

qwen2.5-14b.name: Qwen2.5 14B
qwen2.5-14b.description: Efficient multilingual model from Alibaba optimized for deployment with strong performance-to-size ratio. Ideal for applications requiring quality responses with lower compute requirements.

qwen2.5-7b.name: Qwen2.5 7B
qwen2.5-7b.description: Compact yet capable multilingual model from Alibaba, perfect for edge deployment and high-throughput scenarios. Delivers impressive performance for its size across diverse tasks.

qwen2.5-coder-32b.name: Qwen2.5 Coder 32B
qwen2.5-coder-32b.description: Specialized code generation model from Alibaba with state-of-the-art performance on programming tasks. Trained on massive code corpora for exceptional code completion, generation, and debugging.

qwen2.5-coder-7b.name: Qwen2.5 Coder 7B
qwen2.5-coder-7b.description: Efficient code-specialized model from Alibaba for lightweight deployment. Provides strong coding capabilities in a compact package, ideal for edge and high-volume applications.

phi-3-medium.name: Phi-3 Medium
phi-3-medium.description: Microsoft's capable medium-sized model with strong performance on reasoning, coding, and math. Trained on high-quality data to deliver results comparable to much larger models.

phi-3-mini.name: Phi-3 Mini
phi-3-mini.description: Microsoft's highly capable small language model that punches far above its weight class. Trained on high-quality data to deliver performance comparable to models 10x its size.

phi-3-vision.name: Phi-3 Vision
phi-3-vision.description: Microsoft's small multimodal model with strong image understanding and reasoning capabilities. Processes images and text together for document analysis, visual Q&A, and more.

yi-large.name: Yi Large
yi-large.description: Powerful bilingual model (English/Chinese) from 01.AI with strong reasoning and general capabilities. Excels at complex tasks across both languages with high-quality outputs.

yi-1.5-9b.name: Yi 1.5 9B
yi-1.5-9b.description: Improved compact bilingual model from 01.AI with enhanced performance and efficiency. Ideal for applications requiring both English and Chinese capabilities in a lightweight package.

stable-diffusion-3.name: Stable Diffusion 3
stable-diffusion-3.description: Stability AI's latest text-to-image model with enhanced prompt adherence, typography, and image quality. Generates stunning visuals from natural language with improved composition.

stable-diffusion-xl.name: Stable Diffusion XL
stable-diffusion-xl.description: Leading text-to-image generation model producing high-quality, photorealistic images from natural language descriptions. Excels at creative and artistic applications.

playground-v2.5.name: Playground v2.5
playground-v2.5.description: Specialized text-to-image model optimized for aesthetic quality and visual appeal. Produces stunning, artistically pleasing images with vibrant colors and balanced compositions.

dreamlike-photoreal.name: Dreamlike Photoreal 2.0
dreamlike-photoreal.description: Specialized text-to-image model focused on generating stunning photorealistic images with exceptional detail, lighting, and composition. Perfect for professional visual content creation.

sdxl-turbo.name: SDXL Turbo
sdxl-turbo.description: Real-time text-to-image model capable of generating high-quality images in a single step. Enables instantaneous image creation for interactive and iterative applications.

llava-1.6-34b.name: LLaVA 1.6 34B
llava-1.6-34b.description: Advanced multimodal model combining vision and language understanding. Can analyze images, answer questions about visual content, and engage in detailed conversations about what it sees.

llava-1.6-13b.name: LLaVA 1.6 13B
llava-1.6-13b.description: Balanced vision-language model from the LLaVA family. Provides strong image understanding and conversational capabilities in an efficient package.

llava-1.6-7b.name: LLaVA 1.6 7B
llava-1.6-7b.description: Efficient vision-language model for lightweight multimodal applications. Perfect for edge deployment with strong image understanding and conversational abilities.

bakllava.name: BakLLaVA
bakllava.description: Multimodal model combining Mistral 7B with vision capabilities. Excels at understanding images and engaging in detailed conversations about visual content.

cogvlm2.name: CogVLM2
cogvlm2.description: Advanced multimodal model with strong visual understanding and reasoning. Capable of detailed image analysis, optical character recognition, and complex visual question answering.

idefics2.name: Idefics2
idefics2.description: Hugging Face's multimodal model with strong document understanding and visual reasoning. Excels at interpreting charts, diagrams, and mixed text-image content.

florence-2.name: Florence-2
florence-2.description: Microsoft's vision foundation model handling multiple vision tasks from captioning to detection. Unifies image understanding capabilities in a single efficient model.

qwen2-vl-72b.name: Qwen2 VL 72B
qwen2-vl-72b.description: Alibaba's powerful vision-language model with state-of-the-art image and video understanding. Excels at detailed visual analysis, OCR, and multimodal reasoning at scale.

qwen2-vl-7b.name: Qwen2 VL 7B
qwen2-vl-7b.description: Efficient vision-language model from Alibaba for lightweight multimodal applications. Provides strong image and video understanding in a compact, deployable package.

whisper-large-v3.name: Whisper Large v3
whisper-large-v3.description: State-of-the-art automatic speech recognition model from OpenAI, supporting multilingual transcription and translation with remarkable accuracy across diverse audio conditions.

whisper-medium.name: Whisper Medium
whisper-medium.description: Balanced speech recognition model from OpenAI offering strong performance with lower resource requirements. Ideal for production deployments needing quality transcription.

whisper-small.name: Whisper Small
whisper-small.description: Efficient speech recognition model for fast, lightweight transcription. Perfect for real-time applications and resource-constrained environments.

musicgen.name: MusicGen
musicgen.description: Meta's music generation model capable of creating high-quality melodies and compositions from text descriptions. Supports melody conditioning and stereo generation.

bark.name: Bark
bark.description: Suno's text-to-speech model generating highly expressive, natural-sounding speech with emotions, non-verbal communications, and even music. Supports multiple languages.

jina-embeddings-v3.name: Jina Embeddings v3
jina-embeddings-v3.description: High-performance text embedding model supporting 89 languages with state-of-the-art retrieval performance. Excels at semantic search, clustering, and classification tasks.

nomic-embed-text.name: Nomic Embed Text
nomic-embed-text.description: Powerful open-source text embedding model with strong performance on retrieval and classification. Features 8192 context length and Matryoshka representation learning.

nomic-embed-vision.name: Nomic Embed Vision
nomic-embed-vision.description: Vision embedding model producing high-quality image representations. Enables semantic image search, clustering, and multimodal retrieval tasks.

gte-large.name: GTE Large
gte-large.description: Alibaba's general text embedding model with strong performance on retrieval and semantic tasks. Features 8192 context length for long document understanding.

clip-vit-large.name: CLIP ViT-Large
clip-vit-large.description: OpenAI's vision-language model for zero-shot classification and multimodal retrieval. Aligns images and text in a shared embedding space for cross-modal understanding.

siglip.name: SigLIP
siglip.description: Google's vision-language model with sigmoid loss optimization for efficient multimodal learning. Excels at zero-shot classification and image-text alignment tasks.

owlvit.name: OWLvIT
owlvit.description: Open-vocabulary object detection model capable of detecting objects based on free-form text queries. Enables flexible detection without fixed category labels.

grounding-dino.name: Grounding DINO
grounding-dino.description: Advanced open-set object detector combining vision and language for detecting arbitrary objects from text descriptions. Excels at referring expression comprehension.

sam2.name: SAM 2
sam2.description: Meta's Segment Anything Model 2 for precise image and video segmentation. Supports interactive prompting with points, boxes, and masks for fine-grained object separation.

depth-anything.name: Depth Anything
depth-anything.description: Monocular depth estimation model producing high-quality depth maps from single images. Excels at capturing fine details and handling diverse scenes.

dpt-large.name: DPT Large
dpt-large.description: Intel's dense prediction transformer for monocular depth estimation. Provides robust depth predictions with strong generalization across diverse datasets.
